chapter_title: Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 622. Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 622.074 — Nonapplicability of Subchapter

This subchapter does not apply to:

    (1) farm equipment used for a purpose other than construction;

    (2) special mobile equipment owned by a dealer or distributor;

    (3) a vehicle used to propel special mobile equipment that is registered as a farm vehicle under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) ; or

    (4) equipment while being used by a commercial hauler to transport special mobile equipment under hire of a person who derives $500 in gross receipts annually from a farming or ranching enterprise.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 105, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: This subchapter does not apply to:
farm equipment used for a purpose other than construction;
special mobile equipment owned by a dealer or distributor;
a vehicle used to propel special mobile equipment that is registered as a farm vehicle under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) ; or
equipment while being used by a commercial hauler to transport special mobile equipment under hire of a person who derives $500 in gross receipts annually from a farming or ranching enterprise.
